steps.title: Identify cause and effect
steps.content: The text contrasts the bulky Wright Flyer with modern planes that have sleeker, more streamlined bodies. The final sentence explains the result of that design difference: modern planes are more aerodynamic.

steps.title: Choose the result transition
steps.content: Choice A signals a final item in a list. Choice B signals contradiction. Choice D signals that the point is true despite something else. The needed relationship is consequence, because sleek bodies lead to better aerodynamics. The answer is C.
